text: Persist watchdog connection and animator state across frontend reloads
description:
If a watchdog session was connected and the animator/watchdog was enabled, a frontend hot reload or full page reload should reconnect to the running session automatically, restore terminal buffers, and show the correct enabled/emergency state without stopping the background animator loop.

**Current state:** Implementation complete (auto-resume, state restoration, terminal hydration). Frontend type-check/build and session builds pass. Needs end-to-end browser reload verification on a real local machine (cannot be tested in sandbox).

status.comment: Blocked by need for browser reload testing on real machine - see supporting aim afd3e0ff
